title: Malty Juicy German Tomato Wrap
description: A cozy German dish featuring San Marzano tomatoes, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. The combination of malty flavors and juicy tomatoes is sure to please.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add crushed San Marzano tomatoes, beer, caraway seeds, sugar, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, prepare the leaf wraps by steaming them for 30 seconds.
To assemble the wraps, place a portion of the tomato mixture onto the center of each leaf, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the bottom edge of the leaf up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Repeat with the remaining tomato mixture and leaf wraps.
